free_text: Cross section for the formation of gamma-quanta
during the interaction of fast neutrons with carbon,
Detector response function measurement method using
Time scale was calibrated by variable delay and checked
according to the carbon resonances in transmission
- energy distributions and neutron flux on the sample
Angle between between neutron beam and gamma-detector
. All-wave neutron counter was served as monitor.
DE is obtained as DA/DE times 4PI
In formula (1) of J,SNP,23,269,1976 for cross section
- A coefficient taking into account geometry
and normalization according to monitor channel.
For backgrounds - 3 - 10 % for Re, 0-2 % for Pb
For multiple scattering, calculated by Monte Carlo
method < ~ 5 %, 17 %, 15 % for C, Re, Pb, respectively.
For gamma-quanta angular distribution < 5.% for C.
Uncertainty in the method of analysis.
(+-0.135 nsec/m) - ~4.% at En=9 MeV, <1.% at En<5 MeV.
